landing.heroTitle: Writing at the intersection of AML, financial crime, and policy execution.
landing.heroBody: I write practical, research-backed analysis on anti-money laundering, transaction monitoring, sanctions risk, and financial crime typologies for professionals who need clarity over noise.
landing.writingBody: My work translates complex regulation and operational pain points into concise, usable guidance for compliance teams, investigators, and risk leaders.
landing.comingSoonBody: I am currently developing my first AML/financial crime book. This section previews the themes and frameworks it will cover.
landing.aboutBody1: I am an author and technologist based in Barrie, Ontario. Specializing in financial crime, I use my background in computer science and graduate studies in technology management to understand the vulnerabilities in both digital architectures and human behaviour.
landing.aboutBody2: Across my work, I explore how institutions can reduce false positives, improve investigative quality, and build compliance programs that are both defensible and efficient.
landing.contactBody: If you're building training, thought leadership, or publication content in AML and financial crime, I am open to collaborations, guest writing, and speaking opportunities.

investigations.label: Investigations
investigations.desc: Case development, narrative quality, and evidence-based reporting standards.

risk.label: Risk and Controls
risk.desc: Transaction monitoring, sanctions controls, and model governance through a practitioner lens.

regulation.label: Regulatory Signals
regulation.desc: Distilling guidance, enforcement actions, and emerging expectations into actionable insight.

humanBehaviour.label: Human Behaviour
humanBehaviour.desc: Examining behavioural patterns, decision-making bias, and social engineering dynamics linked to financial crime.

tradeBased.title: Trade-Based Money Laundering
tradeBased.desc: Patterns, red flags, and data constraints that matter when moving from theory to real detection workflows.

crypto.title: Crypto and Hybrid Illicit Flows
crypto.desc: How digital assets intersect with legacy laundering channels and what that means for controls.

suspiciousActivity.title: Suspicious Activity Reporting
suspiciousActivity.desc: Practical frameworks for writing clearer reports that improve law-enforcement utility.
